description: Generate a scientific schematic/diagram (flowchart, architecture, pathway, etc.) from a natural-language prompt, using Nano Banana 2 via the OpenRouter API with document-type-aware quality gating and smart iteration.
rules: calls the OpenRouter API — requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY in env
usage: Set PROMPT (diagram description); optionally DOC_TYPE (default: default). Requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Output: schematic.png.
limitation: Network + paid API. Offline or without OPENROUTER_API_KEY the porter writes a stub report instead of a real image. Capped at 2 refinement iterations.
